_description: Wave 198: saturn-v-feud running bit. ~40s. Status: SCRIPT BANKED, video_url fields are TODO. The visual joke: Bart and Teddy at different desks, both clearly aware of each other but never looking up.
title: The Saturn V, A Disagreement

voiceover.instructions: Deadpan documentary register. Slow, level, slightly weary.

segments.name: title_open
segments.text:
THE SATURN V

Month 14
of a disagreement
segments.narration: The Saturn V. Month fourteen of a disagreement.
segments.instructions: Documentary opener. 'A disagreement' delivered as if it were 'an audit' — same flat affect.

segments.name: bart_position
segments.video_url: TODO: generate Higgsfield clip — Bart at his desk, writing on a manila folder, glasses low on nose.
segments.narration: Bart maintains the Saturn V is not a vehicle. It is, in his words, a building that briefly left.
segments.instructions: Two sentences. The second is the kicker — read it with NO smile, exactly the same flat register as the first.

segments.name: teddy_response
segments.video_url: TODO: generate Higgsfield clip — Teddy at his desk, slightly more energetic, reading from a book.
segments.narration: Teddy disagrees, politely, in Latin where possible.
segments.instructions: Documentary cadence. Slight comma-pause after 'politely'. Falling tone on 'possible'.

segments.name: closing_tag
segments.instructions: Three words. Final beat. The shrug is in the writing, not the read.
